_comment: Re-run of tab:aibq2-core (AIBQ2 core ablations) on the n=113 AIBQ2 exam with current pipeline. The original numbers were generated with very old agent/aggregator code; this is a fresh end-to-end run for an apples-to-apples comparison with the FB results elsewhere in the paper. Also swaps the deprecated kimi-k2-thinking ablation with the newer kimi-k2.5 (which is what we use in tab:cross-llm-topline and fig:factor-effects-vs-nobel). After this lands we can drop the 'K2-Thinking on AIBQ2 only' footnote in tab:llms. Headline = pro-high-brave-c0-t0 per experiments/configs/paper_aibq2.json (no crowd, no tools — AIBQ2 questions are Metaculus-only and were intentionally run without yfinance/FRED tool calls). agg_method=shrink-std-loo (modern default; the old paper used shrink-std-aibq2 with hardcoded f=0.3 c=0.7).
